meaning: adj.抑制癌发生的,防癌的 抗癌的
examples: OBJECTIVE: To study the anticarcinogenic mechanism of polyphenolic compounds in tea.
Objective To explore anticarcinogenic effect of Elemene Emulsion' s Injection on transplanting tumor and tumor cell lines of mice.
Moreover, in vitro and animal trials have shown symbiotic microflora in kefir have anticarcinogenic, antimutagenic and antimicrobial properties.
